eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Atascosa; Blanco; Burnet; Karnes; Kimble; Wilson; Williamson; Kerr; Bandera; Comal; Llano; Medina; Gillespie; Uvalde; Travis; Guadalupe; Mason; DeWitt; Frio; Fayette; Lavaca; Gonzales; Caldwell; Hays; Zavala; Bexar; Kendall; Bastrop, TX; at 11:43 AM ON MAY 23, 2026 Effective until 02:43 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from San Antonio, Texas. Missing Child is Damonie Wade 10 year old black male, last seen wearing a blue shirt, gray sweatpants, and black slides. Call San Antonio Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from San Antonio, Texas.
